---
name: False positive
about: Report an incorrect suggestion
title: "[false-positive]: "
labels: false-positive
---

## Input Text

```text
Paste only the smallest public-safe text that triggers the suggestion.
```

Do not paste private Arabic text, full documents, personal details, proprietary text, tokens, or private URLs. If possible, use the web workbench feedback report with no raw text or a selected safe span only.

## Suggestion Source

Example: `arabic:tatweel`

## Expected Behavior

Explain why the text should not be flagged.

## Environment

- OS:
- Alfaraheedi version or commit:
- CLI/API/Docker:

## Fixture Consent

May a reduced/redacted version of this example become a public eval fixture? yes/no
